content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pubs.rsc.org/en/content/articlehtml/2025/ee/d5ee03461b", "source_title": "Stability/durability challenges of cathode catalysts for PEM fuel cells: experiments, mechanisms, and perspectives beyond three-electrode systems", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Stability/durability challenges of cathode catalysts for PEM fuel cells: experiments, mechanisms, and perspectives beyond three-electrode sy...", "direct_quote": "Stability/durability challenges of cathode catalysts for PEM fuel cells: experiments, mechanisms, and perspectives beyond three-electrode systems\nThe sluggish oxygen reduction reaction (ORR) determines the performance and lifetime of proton exchange ", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Commercialized cathodic ORR catalysts are synthesized using platinum-group-metal (PGM)-based chemicals, which suffer from low geological res...", "direct_quote": "Commercialized cathodic ORR catalysts are synthesized using platinum-group-metal (PGM)-based chemicals, which suffer from low geological reserves; hence, PGM-free catalysts are emerging as alternatives.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
